name: twincat-automation
description: TwinCAT 3 IDE automation and PLC runtime control

tools.name: ConnectIde
tools.description: Connect to TwinCAT 3 IDE (XAE Shell or VS2022)

tools.name: NewProject
tools.description: Create new TwinCAT project with PLC and MAIN program

tools.name: GetProjectTree
tools.description: Read full project structure as JSON tree

tools.name: WritePouCode
tools.description: Write Structured Text code into a POU

tools.name: BuildProject
tools.description: Build PLC project and return results

tools.name: EnableConfig
tools.description: Activate TwinCAT configuration. Use Force to do full Config->Activate->Run cycle via ADS (no dialogs)

tools.name: EnterPlcOnline
tools.description: Login to PLC runtime and download program (no dialogs, uses Login(3) flag)

PlcProjectPath.description: Tree path to PLC project (auto-detected if omitted)

tools.name: SetSystemState
tools.description: Switch TwinCAT system state via ADS WriteControl (no dialogs)

tools.name: ConnectAds
tools.description: Connect to PLC runtime via ADS. AmsNetId is auto-detected from IDE target if omitted.

tools.name: ReadVariable
tools.description: Read PLC variable value by symbol name

tools.name: SetPlcState
tools.description: Set PLC runtime state (Run/Stop/Reset) via ADS
